description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a large, rectangular metal head featuring beveled edges and reinforced corners. The head is adorned with a decorative, circular emblem on its side, surrounded by rivet-like details, giving it a slightly ornate yet industrial appearance. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of a dark, possibly composite or metal material, seamlessly fitted into the hammerhead. The head's surface is smooth and dark, with metallic highlights and a subtle sheen, suggesting a high-quality finish. The overall design is utilitarian but with a touch of decorative craftsmanship, suitable for demanding tasks in urban construction or demolition. No visible signs of wear, branding, or attachments are present, indicating a pristine and possibly new condition.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a large, rectangular metal head featuring decorative rivets and a dark, straight handle. The design is both functional and slightly ornate, with a smooth, high-quality finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, the decorative emblem, and rivet details on the head.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, highlighting the cylindrical shape and the width of the hammerhead.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the emblem and rivet details visible.
description_view_3: View of the striking face of the hammerhead, showing its flat, solid surface and the rectangular profile.
attribute_handle_type: straight composite handle with a smooth, cylindrical shape and a dark finish
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head with beveled edges, flat striking faces, and decorative rivet details
